greeting.line: Hub to hub, layer to layer — I don't care which bank you step off. Just don't fall in.
greeting.line_friendly: You again. Good. The current likes familiar faces.
greeting.line_hostile: Keep moving. Ferries don't wait for grudges.

options.text: Heard about wardens at the landmarks?

dungeon.line: Generated once, then static. Death kicks you out with your pockets. The Periliminal is the one that keeps what it kills — don't confuse them.

depth.line: Three floors if you're counting. The seal remembers your seed — same bones every return.

wardens.line: Stage-three things. They sit on the skyline like they own the silhouette. Kill enough and something bigger notices.

titan.line: Metroplex Titan. World boss. StoryVote shapes the window — or the city just schedules one. Offline, the schedule is lonely but real.
